name: ASAP Credit Repair
description_short: ASAP Credit Repair is a Houston, TX-based credit repair firm. 2,461 Google reviews. Not BBB rated or accredited. Offers dispute services for all three bureaus.
description_long:
ASAP Credit Repair is a credit repair firm based in Houston, Texas, specializing in helping consumers improve their credit scores through professional dispute services with all three major credit bureaus. The company has accumulated approximately 2,461 Google reviews, building a local reputation in the Houston market. The company offers credit report analysis, dispute letter preparation, debt validation, and credit-building guidance.

The company targets consumers with inaccurate negative items on their credit reports, including collections, late payments, charge-offs, and other derogatory marks. Services reportedly include comprehensive three-bureau analysis, dispute filing, and ongoing monitoring of results. The company is not BBB accredited and has no BBB rating, limiting independent quality verification.

Consumers should understand that no credit repair company can legally guarantee specific score improvements or remove accurate negative information. The Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA) requires written contracts, prohibits upfront fees before work begins, and provides a three-day cancellation right. Before enrolling, get pricing in writing and compare against national providers.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

tiers.name: Credit Repair Service
features: Negative item identification and dispute strategy
Direct dispute filing with credit bureaus

pros: Exceptional local reputation — 5.0/5 from 111 Google reviews, unusually strong for a credit repair service
Local McAllen office provides in-person access, which most national credit repair companies do not offer
Part of the ASAP Credit Repair USA network, suggesting structured processes and documented methodology
Dual classification as credit counseling service and credit reporting agency affiliate indicates broader service scope
Serves a bilingual community (Rio Grande Valley), likely offering Spanish-language support
cons: Pricing and specific service packages are not publicly listed and must be obtained directly, making comparison-shopping difficult
As a franchise location, service quality and staff expertise may vary from the broader national brand's standards
Credit repair results are inherently unpredictable and depend on what is actually disputable in a client's file — no company can guarantee outcomes
Consumers can dispute inaccurate items themselves for free through AnnualCreditReport.com, making paid services optional for those with time and patience
Limited independent third-party reviews outside Google — no BBB accreditation status or CFPB complaint history was verified for this listing
best_for: Houston-area residents seeking local credit repair services
Consumers with credit report errors needing dispute assistance
Individuals preparing for major purchases who need credit improvement
diagnosis: ASAP Credit Repair has decent Google review volume (2,461) in the competitive Houston market but lacks BBB accreditation. Without independent verification or transparent pricing, consumers take on risk. Compare against The Credit People ($79/mo), Lexington Law, or local BBB-accredited alternatives before committing.
services: Three-bureau credit report review (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Negative item identification and dispute strategy
Direct dispute filing with credit bureaus on client's behalf
Debt validation letters to original creditors and collectors
Goodwill adjustment request letters for accounts in good standing
Credit counseling and financial behavior coaching
Credit score monitoring and progress tracking
Identity theft documentation and dispute support
Credit utilization and credit mix guidance
Ongoing case management with status updates throughout the dispute cycle
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
